side_effects.description: Extreme tiredness/exhaustion within 30-60 minutes of accidentally taking DISP; initially experienced similar tiredness when first starting SS-31 which resolved after a few weeks

protocol_notes: OP normally takes SS-31 2mg in the mornings. Accidentally took a dose of DISP (believed to be a separate compound stored nearby) from an older bottle (~1 year old). Reported exhaustion lasting several hours but noted improvement after some time. Tiredness also occurred when first starting SS-31 but resolved after a few weeks.
